mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.NAME text, p.tree_id parent_id, p.map_url, p.sort_no, p.icon_path, p.mark FROM sys_role_user ur, sys_role r, htht_role_category rc, htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c, htht_cluster_schedule_product p WHERE ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID AND r.ROLE_ID = rc.role_id AND rc.category_id = c.id AND p.tree_id = c.id AND c.tree_key = 'product' AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_no ASC
select id,file_type,file_path,file_name,is_del,relative_path from htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info where product_info_id = #{id} order by file_name desc
select id,file_type,file_name,relative_path as file_url from htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info where product_info_id = #{id} order by file_name desc
SELECT id FROM htht_cluster_schedule_product WHERE tree_id = #{treeId}

select file_path from htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info where product_info_id in (SELECT id FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_info` where product_id = #{productId} and cycle = #{cycle} AND satellite = #{dataSource} AND region_id = #{regionId} and issue >= #{begin} AND issue <= #{end} ) and file_type = 'tif'

SELECT a.mark,CONCAT(c.text,a.name) as name FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product` a LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category b on a.tree_id = b.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c on b.parent_id = c.id where a.id = #{productId}

SELECT DISTINCT b.issue FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_info` a left join htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info b on a.id = b.product_info_id left join htht_cluster_schedule_product c on a.product_id = c.id where b.issue between #{begin} and #{end} and c.id = #{productId} and a.satellite = #{dataSource} and a.cycle = #{cycle} order by b.issue asc

SELECT a.cycle,a.satellite,CONCAT(d.text,"_",b.name) as name FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_info` a LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_product b ON a.product_id = b.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c on b.tree_id = c.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category d on d.id = c.parent_id where b.tree_id = #{id} GROUP BY cycle,satellite,name

SELECT a.file_path as file_path,CONCAT(e.text,d.text) as name FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info` a LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_product_info b on a.product_info_id = b.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_product c on b.product_id = c.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category d on c.tree_id = d.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category e on e.id = d.parent_id where a.product_info_id = #{id} limit 1
select file_path from htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info WHERE issue like CONCAT(#{issue},"%") and (product_type = "doc" or product_type = "docx")
